title: Scientists Help Bees Grow Stronger with Special Food
summary: Scientists from the University of Oxford and other places made a new food for honeybees to help them grow better. Bees need pollen from flowers to get important nutrients called sterols, but climate change and farming have made it harder for bees to find enough flowers. Beekeepers often give bees artificial food that doesn't have these sterols, so bees can become weak. The scientists used engineered yeast to create a special diet with the right sterols. When they tested it, bee colonies that ate this food produced up to 15 times more baby bees, called larvae, and stayed healthier. This new food could be a big help in saving bees from decline.

keywords.explanation: important nutrients in pollen that bees need to grow
baby bees that grow into adult bees
scientists changed yeast to make special food for bees
groups of bees living together in a hive
powder from flowers that bees eat for food

What important nutrients do bees get from pollen?

options: Because of climate change and farming
questions.correct_answer: Because of climate change and farming

questions.question: How many times more baby bees did colonies with the special food produce?
What did scientists use to make the special food?

background_read: Bees are important insects that help plants grow by pollinating flowers. They collect pollen from flowers to eat, which gives them nutrients. But changes in weather and how we farm can make it hard for bees to find enough food. Scientists are working on ways to help bees stay healthy so they can keep helping our environment.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists from the University of Oxford and other universities
WHAT: Made a special food with engineered yeast to give bees important nutrients called sterols
WHERE: Tested in controlled glasshouse experiments
WHY: To help bees grow stronger and produce more baby bees because climate change and farming make it hard for them to find enough flowers

perspectives.description: Scientists created a new food to solve bee nutrition problems and tested it successfully.
